hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: A Day inn Ranong Hostel in Ranong offers air-conditioned rooms with tiled floors. Each room includes a private bathroom, shower, and TV. Guests can enjoy amenities such as a work desk, hairdryer, and slippers.
Essential Facilities: The hostel provides free WiFi, free bicycles, and a garden. Additional facilities include a lounge, shared kitchen, outdoor seating area, and bicycle parking. Daily housekeeping service ensures room cleanliness.
Convenient Location: Located 23 km from Ranong Airport, the hostel is a 4-minute walk from Rattanarangsan Palace. Nearby attractions include Raksa Warin Hot Spring (2.1 km) and Ranong Canyon (12 km). Guests appreciate the friendly staff and excellent service.
